name: Vault Minerals Limited
analysis: VAU has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (3.1× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$4.8000, stop A$3.6333, target A$5.7153 (0.78:1) — then trail it.
